name: Pasta with Chicken & Brocoli
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless Chicken Breasts (cut in half, then into strips)
1/2 lb Bow Tie Pasta OR small lasagna noodles (cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté for about one minute, stirring constantly.
3. DO NOT BURN the mixture.
4. Add chicken and cook until well done.
5. Stir in broccoli and cook until crisp but tender.
6. Mix in basil, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Pour in white wine and chicken broth.
8. Cook for about 5 minutes.
9. Add cooked, drained pasta and toss to combine.
10. Heat the mixture for an additional 1 to 2 minutes.
11. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
